title: Acknowledgements, Delivery Tags, Redelivery, and Effect Ownership · Inference Brief: Manual Auto Ack Tradeoff
summary: A handler acknowledges on a different channel, auto-acks before validation, nacks every error with requeue, treats redelivered false as first-ever processing, and double-acks after a timeout race. Planned artifact: Add and verify the manual auto ack tradeoff increment in delivery ownership and acknowledgement decision table. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose manual or automatic acknowledgement from loss tolerance, consumer memory, work duration, and effect ownership.
Choose acknowledgement, requeue, dead-letter, or channel-close behavior for in-flight work during graceful and forced shutdown.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Predict Manual Auto Ack Tradeoff · Theory Manual Auto Ack Tradeoff
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory messaging team handles case 1691 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to enforce same-generation, exactly-one terminal acknowledgement after durable effect; separate browser evidence from disposable live-broker proof; then raise a broker resource alarm and stop new publisher admission. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose manual or automatic acknowledgement from loss tolerance, consumer memory, work duration, and effect ownership.
